explanations.1: This starts with a pre-built image that has PHP 8.2 and Apache already installed, so you don't have to set them up manually.
explanations.5: This renames the production-ready PHP configuration file to the standard location where PHP looks for its settings.
explanations.7: This switches the user context to 'www-data', which is the unprivileged user that Apache typically runs as for security reasons.
